item.title: u/HammerDoris40k
item.dc:creator: RowanUnderwood

item.title: Some Investigations Move Fucking Faster Than Others
item.description: Look at this absolute fucking masterpiece of state-manufactured consent. 6-0 exposes the staggering asymmetry of our institutional rot. Six fucking citizens arrested for wading in a symbolic pool while elite perpetrators walk with absolute impunity. The doctrinal system wants you focused on the colorful "deviants" breaking minor rules, entirely ignoring the heavily armed enforcers protecting systemic state violence on the other side of that very same wall. It’s a total fucking fabrication of justice. This isn't a glitch; it's the goddamn design. The corporate media and state apparatus collude to criminalize public dissent while actively sheltering the real criminals holding the proverbial gun. It is deeply, fundamentally pathological. ☠️ We are being trained to applaud our own subjugation while the actual threats to humanity go completely unpunished. Wake the fuck up to the theater. #ManufacturedConsent #StateViolence #DoubleStandards #InstitutionalRot #Rage
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: We all will suffer and die, according to Trump.
item.description:
The pedophile himself knows his time is up. The writing is far past on the wall. In fact, it was taken down by court order. In another unhinged, early morning rant. Trump As for usual, kicked and screamed.
This is everybody's job to make sure people get out there and vote. We won't get another chance. Do not be scared of these people. Do not be intimidated. It is our job to put the fear of democracy into them- Peacefully, if possible. https://www.themirror.com/news/politics/breaking-trump-gives-disturbing-warning-1907946

item.title: We MIGHT go see "Supergirl" together...

item.title: Mayor Mamdani kicked off NYC’s outdoor pool season today by jumping into the Thomas Jefferson Pool in East Harlem!This year marks the 90th anniversary of New York City’s iconic WPA-era outdoor pools. Summer is officially here!
item.dc:creator: TheCoolDad

item.title: A few quotes from one of Americas greatest labor organizers
item.description:
And the only reason why we don’t, is because they keep us to desperate to be able to stop
This is what the left means when we say capitalism is theft. Do you think Bezos is worth billions because he’s stuffing Amazon boxes? Or does he just take a bunch of the wealth other people do the actual work for.
That’s you by the way, regardless of what job you have, you’re holding the shovel, and some capitalist gets a lot of the reward
Socialism and organized labor go hand in hand, many are often both. You should ask yourself why that is… https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Haywood
I’d bet they’d taste good slow cooked with sweet baby rays
To sum it all up
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: Riley Gaines is an idiot
item.description: Folks, just because somebody is famous does not make them an expert in everything else. Most of these people barely can open up an email, let alone understand geopolitics, history, or anything else that is complex. Stop making brain dead bimbos. And Hyper-masculine dickheads like Rogan Have a quote-unquote credible voice.

item.title: The Absolute, Chef-Kiss Irony of a Fucking Passport Lecture
item.description: Holy absolute fucking shit. Trump’s brilliant idea for the new passport apparently features the message "Welcome, but be good." A message printed inside a US passport. For AMERICANS. Who are ALREADY citizens! Did a single sentient being explain how travel documents work?! ♂️✈️ The man is genuinely "Dumb. With a fucking B." He seems to think an American passport is handed out to foreign nationals like a complimentary mint at a terrible airport hotel. It is a level of dense that completely defies the basic laws of physics! ❌ Honestly, it's the inevitable result of a leader completely surrounded by terrified sycophants who just nod along to every brain-meltingly stupid idea. It’s like putting an angry toddler in charge of national security, except this toddler has a weird obsession with gold paint. ☢️ And let's not overlook the absolute, chef-kiss irony here: "Be good" coming from a twice-impeached convicted felon. You literally could not script a more profoundly humiliating, public self-own if you tried for a thousand fucking years. #PassportMishap #DumbWithAB #ClownShow #IronyIsDead
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Here we go
item.description:
The though of Schumer losing a primary makes me so happy
And it’s not stopping there!!
Denver, you also get to vote for a Zohran https://www.kirosforco.com/
LA you get to stick it to establishment democrat Bass in November https://www.latimes.com/california/story/2026-06-22/dsa-wrapup
DSA isn’t just in those cities. Find your chapter and candidate, knock on doors, phone bank, donate if you can, even just tell your friends. It’s not gonna happen on its own https://www.dsausa.org/
Sounds good to me

item.title: GovBrief Today #512
item.description: Paigelynne Gonyea was working this week's election in Syracuse when two federal agents walked into the polling place and ordered her to delete an Instagram post. Gonyea had posted that she hoped Jonathan Ross, the ICE agent who killed Renee Good in Minneapolis, was indicted, after she read his name in the newspaper. The agents had a folder containing screenshots of her Instagram posts, a copy of her driver's license, and a form warning of federal and state charges. Ross has never been charged. The woman who repeated his name got agents sent after her. A visit like that is almost never about a single message. It is meant to reach everyone who hears the story and scare them into saying less. Gonyea refused. I've emailed 7,991 stories over 512 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260626-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june26 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/insurance-drops [3] https://go.govbrief.today/black-subpoena [4] https://go.govbrief.today/soot-pollution [5] https://go.govbrief.today/dan-sullivans [6] https://go.govbrief.today/100-tariff [7] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-ai-takeover [8] https://go.govbrief.today/bolton-plea [9] https://go.govbrief.today/va-weapons-ban [10] https://go.govbrief.today/vader-arrest [11] https://go.govbrief.today/buttigieg-twins [12] https://go.govbrief.today/tx-bible [13] https://go.govbrief.today/passport-trump [14] https://go.govbrief.today/church-state-separation [15] https://go.govbrief.today/adani-doj [16] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-air [17] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-election-worker Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
